patch.value:
## Context
GH-205 asks pm health's telemetry warning to expose flush/probe diagnostics for fetch-failed queues so agents can self-diagnose. pm-300m added basic runtime diagnostics (queue_entries, last_*_flush_at); the OTEL trace-export path has NO diagnostics, and the new pending-spans store (see [[pm-25se]]) needs the same observability.

## Acceptance criteria
- Telemetry runtime state tracks OTEL export diagnostics: last_otel_attempt_at / last_otel_success_at / last_otel_failure_at / last_otel_failure_error / pending_otel_spans.
- pm health telemetry check + --json surface these alongside the existing flush diagnostics, with actionable remediation when the endpoint looks unreachable (fetch-failed).
- Advisory only (never flips overall health to error); consistent with existing telemetry_* advisory semantics.

Built on top of [[pm-25se]] (introduces the pending-spans store + OTEL diagnostics fields).
GH-205: surface telemetry flush/probe + OTEL export diagnostics in pm health

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Implemented in same branch: pm health --check-telemetry --json now surfaces pending_otel_spans + last_otel_attempt/success/failure_at + last_otel_failure_error, plus advisory warning telemetry_otel_export_failing:<n> with a remediation-registry entry. Verified in sandbox against a stuck blackhole span. Also extended env_overrides with telemetry_inline_flush + telemetry_source_context (overlaps pm-r7md health AC).

author: claude-code-agent

patch.value: Telemetry runtime state records OTLP export diagnostics; pm health surfaces them advisory-only.

message: Added: pm health --check-telemetry now surfaces OTLP export + flush diagnostics (pending_otel_spans, last_otel_attempt/success/failure_at, last_otel_failure_error) with an advisory telemetry_otel_export_failing warning + remediation entry; env_overrides extended (PR #233).

patch.value: pm health --check-telemetry surfaces OTLP export + flush diagnostics with an advisory telemetry_otel_export_failing warning + remediation entry.
Agents can self-diagnose a stalled traces endpoint from pm health --json without flipping overall health to error.
Diagnostics + advisory warning verified in sandbox against a stuck blackhole span.
